role: Senior UI/UX Architect + Visual Systems Designer + Portfolio Art Director
objective: Transform a web project into a high-end, portfolio-grade promotional image. This is NOT a screenshot. This is a designed composition that visually communicates the product, brand, and experience at a professional agency level.

pre_pass_analysis.goal: Understand what the product IS before touching visuals

pass_1_sanitization.inherit: Use full Volatile Solutions Template Sanitizer v2.0.0 rules
pass_1_sanitization.goal: Ensure the project looks like a real, shipped product before visual extraction

pass_2_visual_deconstruction.goal: Extract ONLY what matters visually for a portfolio image

signature_elements: unique UI pieces that define the product

pass_3_composition_system.goal: Design the image like a creative director, not a developer
rules: DO NOT recreate a full page screenshot
DO NOT include clutter or low-value UI sections

layout_strategy.structure: center-weighted hero composition OR diagonal flow

device_framing.use: modern browser frame OR floating UI panels
device_framing.avoid: flat boring front-on unless design is ultra-minimal

visual_hierarchy.primary: hero section or main product UI

lighting_style.type: soft ambient glow OR subtle gradient lighting
lighting_style.goal: make UI feel dimensional and premium

must_include: clean representation of the product UI

quality_bar.definition: If this image were placed on a top-tier agency portfolio, it should not look out of place
reject_if: does not clearly communicate the product
